title: Flash All Purpose Floor Cleaner Liquid Fresh LEMON Scent, 1L (Pack of 3)
features: TRIPLE PACK VALUE: Stock up and save with this convenient multi-pack containing 3 x 1L bottles of Flash All Purpose Cleaner.
POWERFUL ALL-PURPOSE CLEANER: Cuts through up to 100% of dirt, grease, and grime, making it your perfect partner for a clean home.
FRESH LEMON SCENT: Leaves your home filled with a delightful and refreshing lemon fragrance, eliminating odours.
BRILLIANT STREAK-FREE SHINE: Delivers a best-ever shine on your floors and surfaces, leaving no harsh residues behind.
MULTI-SURFACE VERSATILITY: Ideal for cleaning hard, washable surfaces including kitchen floors, bathroom tiles, sinks, and work surfaces. Can be used diluted or neat.
description: Product description Experience a Powerful Clean and Sparkling Shine with Flash Stock up on your cleaning essential with this great value 3-pack of Flash All Purpose Fresh Lemon Floor Cleaner . Each pack contains three 1L bottles, ensuring you're always ready to tackle dirt and grime around your home. Flash All Purpose Cleaner is the perfect solution for your entire home. Its powerful formula cuts through up to 100% of dirt and grease, leaving your surfaces sparkling clean and free from harsh residues. It's free from bleach and ammonia, making it a great choice for everyday cleaning. Key Features: Outstanding Cleaning: Powers through tough stains, dirt, and grease with ease. Brilliant Shine: Leaves floors and surfaces gleaming with a streak-free finish. Uplifting Scent: Infuses your home with an intense and refreshing lemon fragrance. Multi-Purpose Use: Versatile enough for most hard, washable surfaces. How to Use: Dilute (for floors): Use 60ml (2 capfuls) in 5L of water. No need to rinse. Neat (for tough stains): Pour directly onto the stain or a sponge. Always rinse with water afterwards. Not suitable for non-washable surfaces (e.g., untreated or oiled wood). If in doubt, test on a small, hidden area first. What's in the Box: 3 x Flash All Purpose Fresh Lemon Floor Cleaner (1L Bottle) Ingredients <5% Anionic surfactants, Non-ionic surfactants, Phosphonates; Perfumes, Citral, Citronellol, Limonene, Linalool, Pinene, Terpineol, Terpinolene.
